features: Glimmering Hydration: Dr.PAWPAW x WICKED Glimmer Lip Balm moisturises, nourishes, and hydrates your lips, leaving them soft and glowing.
Pink Shimmer Finish: Adds a subtle pink glimmer for lips that shine and stand out, inspired by WICKED's magical charm.
Infused with Natural Pawpaw: Enriched with pawpaw for deep hydration and care, perfect for maintaining healthy, luscious lips.
Collaboration: A unique blend of beauty and WICKED-inspired design for fans and beauty lovers alike.
Perfect for Daily Use: Lightweight, compact, and easy to carry, ideal for on-the-go hydration and a shimmering touch of pink.
description: Product description Elevate your lip care routine with the enchanting Dr.PAWPAW x WICKED Glimmer Lip Balm. This collaboration brings together Dr.PAWPAW’s expert lip care and WICKED’s iconic magic to create a product that is as captivating as it is effective. Infused with natural pawpaw, this lip balm is designed to moisturise, nourish, and hydrate your lips while adding a touch of dazzling pink shimmer for the ultimate "popular" look. The unique formula combines functionality with beauty. Whether you’re facing the chill of winter or the heat of summer, this lip balm ensures your lips remain soft, smooth, and perfectly hydrated all day long. Its nourishing properties help to restore and protect dry, chapped lips, making it an essential part of your daily beauty routine. What sets this lip balm apart is its subtle pink glimmer, designed to enhance your natural beauty. The shimmering finish gives your lips a radiant, healthy glow, perfect for any occasion—from casual outings to glamorous events. With a nod to the charm and allure of WICKED, this lip balm is a true standout in any makeup collection. Compact and lightweight, the Dr.PAWPAW x WICKED Glimmer Lip Balm is ideal for on-the-go use. Pop it into your bag or pocket and enjoy instant hydration and a shimmering finish wherever you are. Its easy-to-apply formula ensures a flawless look in seconds, no matter your lifestyle. Beautifully packaged in a design inspired by WICKED’s beloved characters, this lip balm is not only a treat for yourself but also a thoughtful gift for beauty enthusiasts and WICKED fans alik
